Rebased this to get past LU-5079 and other recent changes. 

It almost certainly needs the quota and blkdev tunable performance patches for production use. Unless those are already on the RHEL 7 kernel?  They were included upstream, so maybe we can get them into RHEL 7 also?

Please use the upstream blkdev patch instead of the one we used for RHEL 6 and earlier.
